description.en: TLC homebrew Bard college of chaos and luck. Chapter 2 unlock. Features at bard levels 3, 6, and 14.
When you roll a 1 on a Bardic Inspiration die, you can reroll it, but you must accompany the reroll with a rude gesture or remark. **Level 3.**

You gain proficiency in Intimidation, learn the Vicious Mockery cantrip, and gain the Tavern Brawler feat. When a creature fails the save against your Vicious Mockery, the taunt chains to a second creature within 15 feet. **Level 3.**

As a reaction when you take damage, reduce it by 1d6 + your Charisma modifier. Uses per long rest equal to 1 + your Charisma modifier. On your last use, your next d20 roll is made with disadvantage. **Level 6.**
When you roll the maximum value on a Bardic Inspiration die, you regain one expended use of Bardic Inspiration. **Level 14.**
